{# Vendor form fields. Wrap the include in:
...
Requires `form` and (optionally) `withholding_taxes`, `vendor`, `selected_wt_ids`. Pass `show_bir_notes=true` to render the informational BIR notes (create/edit pages); the AP quick-add modal omits them. #} {% from "macros.html" import status_toggle %} {# ── Vendor Details ─────────────────────────────────────────── #}

Vendor Details

{{ form.code( class="form-control form-control-sm" + (" field-locked" if vendor else ""), autocomplete="new-password", readonly=(vendor is not none), **{'data-lpignore': 'true'} ) }} {% if form.code.errors %}
{{ form.code.errors[0] }}
{% endif %}
{{ form.name(class="form-control form-control-sm", autocomplete="new-password", **{'data-lpignore': 'true', 'data-form-type': 'other'}) }} {% if form.name.errors %}
{{ form.name.errors[0] }}
{% endif %} {% if show_bir_notes %}Use the vendor's BIR-registered name, exactly as shown on their Certificate of Registration (BIR Form 2303).{% endif %}
{{ status_toggle(form.is_active, label_class='') }}
{# ── Tax Information ────────────────────────────────────────── #}

Tax Information

{{ form.tin(class="form-control form-control-sm", autocomplete="new-password", **{'data-lpignore': 'true'}) }} {% if form.tin.errors %}
{{ form.tin.errors[0] }}
{% endif %} {% if show_bir_notes %}Required on BIR Form 2307 and the vendor's official receipts/invoices. Enter the TIN as registered with the BIR.{% endif %}
{{ form.default_vat_category(class="form-control form-control-sm vendor-vat-select", **{'data-lpignore': 'true'}) }} {% if form.default_vat_category.errors %}
{{ form.default_vat_category.errors[0] }}
{% endif %}
{% if withholding_taxes %} {% for wt in withholding_taxes %}
{% endfor %} {% else %}
No withholding taxes configured. Please set up withholding taxes in the maintenance module.
{% endif %}
{# ── Contact Information ────────────────────────────────────── #}

Contact Information

{{ form.contact_person(class="form-control form-control-sm", autocomplete="new-password", **{'data-lpignore': 'true'}) }} {% if form.contact_person.errors %}
{{ form.contact_person.errors[0] }}
{% endif %}
{{ form.phone(class="form-control form-control-sm", autocomplete="new-password", **{'data-lpignore': 'true'}) }} {% if form.phone.errors %}
{{ form.phone.errors[0] }}
{% endif %}
{{ form.email(class="form-control form-control-sm", type="text", autocomplete="new-password", **{'data-lpignore': 'true'}) }} {% if form.email.errors %}
{{ form.email.errors[0] }}
{% endif %}
{{ form.address(class="form-control form-control-sm", rows="2", autocomplete="new-password", **{'data-lpignore': 'true'}) }} {% if form.address.errors %}
{{ form.address.errors[0] }}
{% endif %} {% if show_bir_notes %}Registered business address as printed on the vendor's BIR documents.{% endif %}
{{ form.postal_code(class="form-control form-control-sm", autocomplete="new-password", **{'data-lpignore': 'true'}) }} {% if form.postal_code.errors %}
{{ form.postal_code.errors[0] }}
{% endif %} {% if show_bir_notes %}Part of the registered address used on BIR forms.{% endif %}
{# ── Payment Information ────────────────────────────────────── #}

Payment Information

{{ form.payment_terms(class="form-control form-control-sm vendor-payment-terms", autocomplete="new-password", **{'data-lpignore': 'true'}) }} {% if form.payment_terms.errors %}
{{ form.payment_terms.errors[0] }}
{% endif %}
{{ form.check_payee_name(class="form-control form-control-sm", autocomplete="new-password", **{'data-lpignore': 'true'}) }} {% if form.check_payee_name.errors %}
{{ form.check_payee_name.errors[0] }}
{% endif %}
